name: Rectangulator

consumes.minimum: 1 active comp + 1 selected ShapeLayer containing a parametric rectangle (ADBE Vector Shape - Rect)
consumes.description: Reads the active CompItem; reads selectedLayers[0] and confirms it is a ShapeLayer; traverses ADBE Root Vectors Group recursively to locate the first ADBE Vector Shape - Rect; reads its size, position, and roundness values; reads fill (color, opacity, blendMode, enabled) and stroke (color, opacity, width, lineCap, lineJoin, miterLimit, enabled) from the containing group; reads the group transform (position, anchorPoint, scale, rotation, opacity, skew, skewAxis).

controls.name: Rectangle Width (px)
controls.role: sets the width of the bezier rectangle path in pixels; drives the path expression and position compensation expression

controls.name: Rectangle Height (px)
controls.role: sets the height of the bezier rectangle path in pixels; drives the path expression and position compensation expression

controls.name: Top Left Corner Rounding
controls.role: sets the top-left corner rounding as a percentage (0–100%) of the shortest dimension; drives the path expression

controls.name: Top Right Corner Rounding
controls.role: sets the top-right corner rounding as a percentage (0–100%) of the shortest dimension; drives the path expression

controls.name: Bottom Right Left Corner Rounding
controls.role: sets the bottom-right corner rounding as a percentage (0–100%) of the shortest dimension; drives the path expression

controls.name: Bottom Left Corner Rounding
controls.role: sets the bottom-left corner rounding as a percentage (0–100%) of the shortest dimension; drives the path expression

controls.name: Anchor Point
controls.role: selects the 9-point anchor grid position (1=Top Left … 9=Bottom Right); drives the path, anchorPoint, and position expressions

functions: detect and locate parametric rectangle inside the selected shape layer hierarchy
read fills, strokes, and transform properties from the source rectangle group
create a new 'Parametric Rectangle' shape group with a bezier path (ADBE Vector Shape - Group) on the layer
copy fill and stroke properties from the original rectangle to the new group
copy transform properties from the original group to the new bezier group
apply 'Rectangulator Controls' pseudo-effect via embedded FFX binary (ApplyFFX)
write a path expression on ADBE Vector Shape that constructs an 8-vertex rounded-rectangle bezier from effect sliders
write an anchorPoint expression on ADBE Vector Anchor Point that maps the Anchor Point dropdown to a 2D offset
write a position expression on ADBE Vector Position that compensates position when width, height, or anchor point changes
remove or hide the original parametric rectangle group
wrap all mutations in an undo group named 'Rectangulator'

scriptSim.scenario: known-blocked — include dependencies prevent standalone execution
scriptSim.inputs: Active comp 'Main Comp' (1920×1080, 10 s, 24 fps); one ShapeLayer 'Rectangle Shape' selected, containing ADBE Vector Shape - Rect inside ADBE Vector Group > ADBE Vectors Group

operations.target: layer.ADBE Effect Parade/Rectangulator Controls (pseudo-effect via ApplyFFX)
Contents/Parametric Rectangle/ADBE Vector Shape - Group/ADBE Vector Shape
Contents/Parametric Rectangle/ADBE Vector Transform Group/ADBE Vector Anchor Point
Contents/Parametric Rectangle/ADBE Vector Transform Group/ADBE Vector Position
Contents/Rectangle 1 (original parametric rect group removed or disabled)

expressions.target: Contents/Parametric Rectangle/ADBE Vector Shape - Group/ADBE Vector Shape

sim.note: Sweeps Rectangle Width (px) from 0 to 1000 px with height fixed at 200, all corners at 0%, anchor at Center (5); plots the resulting bezier vertex positions (w = width/2, 8-vertex closed path).

expressions.target: Contents/Parametric Rectangle/ADBE Vector Transform Group/ADBE Vector Anchor Point

sim.note: Steps through all 9 anchor-point menu positions (1=Top Left … 9=Bottom Right) with width=200 and height=100 fixed; plots resulting [x, y] anchor offset.

expressions.target: Contents/Parametric Rectangle/ADBE Vector Transform Group/ADBE Vector Position

sim.note: Sweeps Rectangle Width (px) from 0 to 1000 with height=200 and anchorType=5 (Center); plots position X compensation (newPos[0] offset) showing how the position shifts to keep the rectangle visually anchored.

notes: HEADLESS script — no ScriptUI dialog; all controls are pseudo-effect sliders applied to the target layer via embedded FFX binary (ApplyFFX).
Depends on three //@include directives (RefManager, ApplyFFX, rectangulator_expressions.js) that must be bundled or available at runtime; the script is KNOWN-BLOCKED in standalone Node execution.

The 'Rectangulator Controls' pseudo-effect parameter names in the binary use short aliases ('Width', 'Height', 'Top Left Roundness %', etc.) which differ from the UI label strings ('Rectangle Width (px)', etc.); expressions reference the short alias form.

The position expression uses a stateful __state object to track delta changes between evaluations; this pattern works in AE's expression engine but cannot be accurately swept in a stateless evaluator.

Corner rounding sliders are percentage-based (0–100%) and are internally converted to pixel values relative to Math.min(width, height); adjacent-corner over-sum constraints prevent intersecting bezier curves.
The original parametric rectangle group is removed (or disabled as a fallback) after conversion; the operation is wrapped in a single undo group named 'Rectangulator'.
